prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d255d7a7`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_d255d7a7`. The rule is: only the 3x3 end-cap attached to a long zero shaft moves to the opposite border; the shaft disappears into `7`, and any `9`s inside that 3x3 cap move with it. Extra `9` markers outside the movable 3x3 cap stay where they are.

`arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry. I discarded the Opus hint as incomplete and documented the correction in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d255d7a7/notes.md): it treats the whole connected non-`7` object as movable, but the official examples only move the 3x3 cap. No shared primitive was needed; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was untouched. Official verification passed `4/4`, the build produced `1000` examples, and generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`. I also spot-checked generated examples from `task.json`; they stay on-family with border-attached horizontal/vertical shafts, translated caps, and sparse leftover `9` noise.
